title: Workflow Run
description: Represents the status and result of a Restack long-running workflow execution.

runId.description: Unique identifier for the workflow run.

workflowName.description: The name of the workflow that was executed.

status.description: Current execution status of the workflow run.

input.description: Input parameters provided when scheduling the workflow.

output.description: Output returned by the workflow upon completion.

error.description: Error message if the workflow run failed.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the workflow run was created.

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the workflow run completed.
